name: wp-scraper-importer
description: Test tooling (wp-env) for WP Scraper Importer. JS/CSS build tooling intentionally removed — this package only provisions WordPress for the Codeception test suites.

scripts.tests:run: npm run tests:start && npm run tests:run:integration && npm run tests:run:end-to-end
scripts.tests:run:integration: wp-env run tests-wordpress --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/WP-Scraper-Importer composer run-script tests:run:integration
scripts.tests:run:end-to-end: wp-env run tests-wordpress --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/WP-Scraper-Importer composer run-script tests:run:end-to-end
scripts.tests:export-db: wp-env run tests-cli wp db export wp-content/plugins/WP-Scraper-Importer/tests/Support/Data/dump.sql
